name: Patriot Acquisition Corp./CI
business: Patriot Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated on October 16, 2025, as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, consolidation, capital stock exchange, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company currently intends to concentrate its efforts in identifying businesses in the financial services industry sector (FIG Sector) with a focus on pursuing targets in the specialty finance sector, particularly specialty lending companies with unique technology platforms, and fee-based fintech and payment companies. The company has not selected any specific business combination target.

exposures.sentence: We currently intend to concentrate our efforts in identifying businesses in the financial services industry sector (FIG Sector) with a focus on pursuing targets in the specialty finance sector, particularly specialty lending companies with unique technology platforms who can generate loan volume digitally for commercial and consumer customers in an efficient manner, and fee -based fintech and payment companies.

We currently intend to concentrate our efforts in identifying businesses in the financial services industry sector (FIG Sector) with a focus on pursuing targets in the specialty finance sector, particularly specialty lending companies with unique technology platforms who can generate loan volume digitally for commercial and consumer customers in an efficient manner, and fee -based fintech and payment companies.
We will also consider investments in the community banking sector, which includes more than 4,000 public and privately held depository institutions in the United States.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 18 months from the closing of this offering or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.

tamClaims.claim: Global fintech market valued at $340.10 billion in 2024, projected to reach $1,126.64 billion by 2032, with CAGR of 16.2%.
tamClaims.sentence: The global fintech market was valued at $340.10 billion in 2024. The market is projected to be worth $394.88 billion in 2025 and reach $1,126.64 billion by 2032, exhibiting a CAGR of 16.2% during the forecast period.

tamClaims.claim: Private credit totaled $1.6 trillion in 2023 and projected to increase by $1 trillion over the next five years.
tamClaims.sentence: Private credit (loans outside the banking industry) totaled $1.6 trillion in 2023 and are projected to increase by $1 trillion over the next five years.

tamClaims.claim: Specialty finance market in the U.S. estimated at approximately $20 trillion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, the specialty finance market in the U.S. was estimated at approximately $20 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: Embedded finance expected to account for $320 billion in revenues worldwide by 2030, led by small and medium-size business segment ($150 billion), consumer segment ($120 billion), and enterprise segment ($50 billion).
tamClaims.sentence: By 2030, embedded finance will account for $320 billion in revenues worldwide, led by the small and medium -size business segment ($150 billion), the consumer segment ($120 billion), and the enterprise segment ($50 billion).

tamClaims.claim: 4,379 total depository institutions in the U.S. held aggregate of $25.1 trillion of assets as of September 30, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: There are 4,379 total depository institutions in the U.S., which held an aggregate of $25.1 trillion of assets as of September 30, 2025.
